title: Sketched-Isotropic-Gaussian Regularizer (SIGReg)
wikilinks: LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels
summary: SIGReg is a regularization technique that enforces latent embeddings to follow an isotropic Gaussian distribution, preventing representation collapse in Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) like LeWorldModel. It operates by p...
